name: Quiche Italian
recipeIngredient: 4 Ounces grated Swiss cheese or Mozzarella cheese (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a heavy skillet, sauté the onion in butter over medium heat until clear and tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add tomato sauce, garlic, salt, pepper, and oregano. Bring mixture to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes or until thickened. Set aside to cool.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs. Add olives, parsley, and cayenne, stirring until well blended.
5. Slowly fold in the tomato mixture (be careful; if too hot, eggs will cook and quiche will not puff).
6. If desired, refrigerate the mixture for a few hours before baking, adding 10 to 15 minutes to baking time.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared shell. Layer mushrooms and any toppings on top.
8. Sprinkle grated cheese over the toppings.
9. Bake in preheated oven for 30 to 35 minutes (40 to 50 minutes if refrigerated) or until puffed and browned.
10. Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes before slicing.
